name: Tech-stack noise
description: Backend integration / data pipeline issues should classify as `technical`. Cross-CRM sync should be cross-cutting (affectedPhaseIds=[]).

problems.text: Our CRM and CDP fall out of sync nightly because the ETL job times out.
Booking confirmation emails take 6+ minutes to send because of a queue backlog in Braze.
The booking widget on the homepage breaks on Safari because of an unmaintained JS dependency.

journeyPhases.label: Pre-Booking
journeyPhases.description: Customer is browsing destinations and shaping intent before purchase.
journeyPhases.trigger: Visits site or app for the first time

journeyPhases.label: Post-Booking
journeyPhases.description: Booking is confirmed; customer awaits trip details and prep info.

journeyPhases.label: Pre-Journey
journeyPhases.description: 24h to 72h before travel — check-in, baggage, anxiety reduction.
